back_translation: And the LORD spoke to Moses in the plains of Moab by the Jordan of Jericho, saying:

'Command the sons of Israel, and they shall give to the Levites from the inheritance of their possession cities to dwell in; and pasturelands for the cities round about them you shall give to the Levites.'
'And the cities shall be for them to dwell in; and their pasturelands shall be for their cattle and for their possessions and for all their living things.'
'And the pasturelands of the cities which you shall give to the Levites — from the wall of the city outward, a thousand cubits round about.'

'And you shall measure outside the city — the east side two thousand by the cubit, and the south side two thousand by the cubit, and the west side two thousand by the cubit, and the north side two thousand by the cubit, with the city in the middle; this shall be for them the pasturelands of the cities.'
'And the cities which you shall give to the Levites — the six cities of refuge, which you shall give for the manslayer to flee there; and besides these you shall give forty-two cities.'
'All the cities which you shall give to the Levites — forty and eight cities; them and their pasturelands.'

'And the cities which you shall give from the possession of the sons of Israel: from the many you shall increase, and from the few you shall decrease; each according to his inheritance which they shall inherit shall give from his cities to the Levites.'
And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying:
'Speak to the sons of Israel and say to them: When you cross the Jordan into the land of Canaan.'
'And you shall designate for yourselves cities; cities of refuge they shall be for you; and the manslayer who strikes a soul unintentionally shall flee there.'
'And the cities shall be for you for refuge from the avenger; and the manslayer shall not die until his standing before the congregation for judgment.'
'And the cities which you shall give — six cities of refuge they shall be for you.'
'Three of the cities you shall give from across the Jordan, and three of the cities you shall give in the land of Canaan; they shall be cities of refuge.'
'For the sons of Israel and for the foreigner and for the resident-alien among them shall these six cities be for refuge, to flee there — anyone who strikes a soul unintentionally.'
'But if with an instrument of iron he strikes him and he dies — a murderer is he; dying the murderer shall be put to death.'
'Or if with a stone of the hand that one would die by it he strikes him and he dies — a murderer is he; dying the murderer shall be put to death.'
'Or with an instrument of wood of the hand that one would die by it he strikes him and he dies — a murderer is he; dying the murderer shall be put to death.'
'The avenger of blood, he shall put the murderer to death; when he meets him, he shall put him to death.'
'And if in hatred he pushed him, or threw upon him with intention, and he died.'
'Or in hostility he struck him with his hand and he died — dying shall the striker be put to death; a murderer is he; the avenger of blood shall put the murderer to death when he meets him.'
'But if in suddenness, without hostility, he pushed him, or threw upon him any instrument without intention.'
'Or with any stone by which one would die, without seeing, and he caused it to fall upon him and he died, while he was not an enemy to him and not seeking his harm.'
'And the congregation shall judge between the striker and between the avenger of blood according to these ordinances.'

'And the congregation shall save the manslayer from the hand of the avenger of blood; and the congregation shall return him to the city of his refuge to which he fled; and he shall dwell in it until the death of the high priest who was anointed with the holy oil.'
'But if going out the manslayer goes out, the border of the city of his refuge to which he fled.'
'And the avenger of blood finds him outside the border of the city of his refuge, and the avenger of blood kills the manslayer — there is to him no blood.'
'For in the city of his refuge he shall dwell until the death of the high priest; and after the death of the high priest the manslayer shall return to the land of his possession.'
'And these shall be to you a statute of judgment for your generations, in all your dwelling places.'
'Everyone who strikes a soul — according to the mouth of witnesses the murderer shall be killed; and one witness shall not testify against a soul for death.'
'And you shall not take a ransom for the life of a murderer who is wicked to die; for dying he shall be put to death.'
'And you shall not take a ransom for fleeing to the city of his refuge, to return to dwell in the land, until the death of the priest.'

'And you shall not pollute the land in which you are; for the blood, it pollutes the land; and for the land there shall be no atonement for the blood which was shed in it, except by the blood of the one who shed it.'
'And you shall not defile the land in which you dwell, in which I dwell in its midst; for I, the LORD, dwell among the sons of Israel.'
